seoTitle: How to Enter HSA Contributions in TurboTax
metaDescription: Learn how to enter Health Savings Account contributions in TurboTax for 2026, covering both individual and employer-sponsored plans.
intro: HSA contributions can meaningfully lower your taxable income, but only if they're entered correctly during filing. This quick guide covers how to enter Health Savings Account contributions in TurboTax for 2026, including both individual contributions and employer-sponsored plans. It's designed to be useful whether you're filing your own return for the first time or preparing returns for multiple clients as a tax professional.

steps.heading: Understand HSA contributions before you start
steps.body: Get familiar with why HSA contributions matter for tax savings and how they fit into your overall return.

steps.heading: Navigate the TurboTax interface for HSA entries
steps.body: Find where TurboTax handles HSA contribution entry so you're not searching around during filing.

steps.heading: Enter your contributions step by step
steps.body: Work through entering both individual and employer-sponsored HSA contributions accurately in TurboTax.

steps.heading: Apply tips for maximizing your contributions
steps.body: A few pointers help ensure you're capturing the full tax benefit available from your HSA contributions.

steps.heading: Watch for common entry mistakes
steps.body: Common errors are flagged so you can double-check your entries before submitting your return.

faq.question: Where do I enter HSA contributions in TurboTax?
faq.answer: TurboTax has a dedicated section for Health Savings Account contributions, and the tutorial walks through navigating to it and entering your figures step by step.

faq.question: Does it matter if my HSA contribution came from my employer or myself?
faq.answer: Yes, the video covers both individual contributions and employer-sponsored plan contributions, since they're often entered and treated differently.

faq.question: What mistakes should I avoid when entering HSA contributions?
faq.answer: Common mistakes are covered in the tutorial to help you avoid entry errors that could affect your tax savings or trigger IRS issues.

faq.question: Can TurboTax pull my HSA contribution data automatically?
faq.answer: The video notes that integration with financial institutions can allow for easier access to transaction histories, which can help streamline entering your contributions.
